rules.name: ET TROJAN Known C2 IP Beacon
rules.author: Emerging Threats
rules.content: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> 45.155.205.233 any (msg:"ET TROJAN Known C2 IP Beacon"; flow:established,to_server; dsize:>0; reference:url,attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1071/; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2400001; rev:2; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, mitre_technique_id T1071;)

rules.name: ET MALWARE Observed Malicious C2 Domain in DNS
rules.author: Emerging Threats
rules.content: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET MALWARE Observed Malicious C2 Domain in DNS Query"; dns.query; content:"malware-c2.example.net"; nocase; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2400002; rev:1; metadata:mitre_technique_id T1071.001;)

rules.name: ET SCAN Potential SSH Scan
rules.author: Emerging Threats
rules.content: alert tcp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET 22 (msg:"ET SCAN Potential SSH Scan"; flow:to_server; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 5, seconds 60; classtype:attempted-recon; sid:2400003; rev:3;)
